import { useState } from 'react'; import { PANEL_CATALOG, MATERIAL_COLORS } from '../catalog'; import { Check, Plus, X, Ruler, Euro, ChevronRight, Layers, Palette } from 'lucide-react'; export default function PanelSelector({ t, project, onChange }) { const [showCustom, setShowCustom] = useState(false); const [customPanel, setCustomPanel] = useState({ name: '', material: 'Personnalisé', thickness: 18, w: 244, h: 122, price: 0 }); const selected = project.selectedPanel || null; const selectPanel = (panel) => { onChange({ ...project, selectedPanel: panel, panel: { w: panel.w, h: panel.h }, pricePerPanel: panel.price, }); }; const addCustom = () => { if (!customPanel.name || !customPanel.w || !customPanel.h) return; selectPanel({ ...customPanel, id: 'custom-' + Date.now() }); setShowCustom(false); }; // Groupe par matière const materials = [...new Set(PANEL_CATALOG.map(p => p.material))]; return (
{/* PANNEAU SÉLECTIONNÉ (Résumé) */} {selected && (
{/* Indicateur couleur matière */}
Sélectionné

{selected.name}

{selected.w}×{selected.h} cm {selected.price.toFixed(2)} € / panneau {selected.thickness}mm
{/* Prix modifiable inline */}
onChange({ ...project, pricePerPanel: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0 })} />
)} {/* CATALOGUE (Si rien n'est sélectionné) */} {!selected && (
{materials.map(mat => (

{mat}

{PANEL_CATALOG.filter(p => p.material === mat).map(panel => ( ))}
))} {/* PANNEAU PERSONNALISÉ */}

Personnalisé

{!showCustom ? ( ) : (

Configuration sur mesure

setCustomPanel(p => ({ ...p, name: e.target.value }))} />
setCustomPanel(p => ({ ...p, w: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 244 }))} />
setCustomPanel(p => ({ ...p, h: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 122 }))} />
setCustomPanel(p => ({ ...p, price: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0 }))} />
)}
)}
); }
